title: helichrysum undulatum subsp. rubicundum
intro: Helichrysum undulatum subsp. rubicundum is a subspecies of the Helichrysum undulatum plant, commonly known as the Coast or Undulate Helichrysum, which is a flowering plant native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum undulatum subsp. rubicundum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through methods such as infusions, tinctures, and essential oil extraction, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
